examples: She strove to perform all her wifely functions perfectly.
She shunned bodily ornamentation and strove to use only the natural movements of her body, undistorted by acrobatic exaggeration and stimulated only by internal compulsion.
She strove mightily to put Mike from her thoughts.
By weaving science lessons into roiling adventure tales, Verne and Hetzel strove to circumvent those strictures.
Flintoff helped himself to another wicket as Pietersen strove to finish off the game.
